g.text: Manages skill lifecycle, discovery, and execution
Cross-CLI compatibility (Claude Code, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex)
LLM-as-judge validation for SPEC.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ADRs
C4 diagram generation, validation, rendering, sync detection
Common utilities used by all skills
Target codebase for analysis (Go, Python, TypeScript, Java)
Search, filter, recommend skills by tags/category
Detect active CLI via env vars, process inspection
Unified API: prompt caching, batch processing
Concurrent skill execution, thread pool management
Generate SPEC.md from requirements + codebase analysis
Detect drift (diagram vs code), sync scoring
Load YAML quality rubrics (spec, architecture, diagram)
Extract JSON from LLM responses, handle markdown blocks
Map code structure → C4 elements (System, Container, Component)
Validate C4 level rules (no element mixing)
Compare diagram graph vs code graph, calculate sync score
